category_sources: Official GitHub README at source_facts.homepage describes ICR as an interactive Crystal console.
source_facts.description identifies this as an interactive console for the Crystal programming language.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title uses "ICR - Interactive Crystal" at source_facts.homepage.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface for ICR.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/crystal-community/icr; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify an interactive Crystal CLI console.
